content.text:
错误信息：

`plugins.entries.tavily.config.webSearch.apiKey: unresolved SecretRef "file:local-secrets:/plugins/entries/tavily/config/webSearch/apiKey". Resolve this command against an active gateway runtime snapshot before reading it.`

错误信息：

`plugins.entries.tavily.config.webSearch.apiKey: unresolved SecretRef "file:local-secrets:/plugins/entries/tavily/config/webSearch/apiKey". Resolve this command against an active gateway runtime snapshot before reading it.`

/usr/local/Cellar/python@3.13/3.13.7/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.13/Resources/Python.app/Contents/MacOS/Python: can't open file '/Users/zaihuilou/.openclaw/workspaces/feishu-planner/skills/tavily-search-pro/lib/tavily_search.py': [Errno 2] No such file or directory

报错：

`plugins.entries.tavily.config.webSearch.apiKey: unresolved SecretRef "file:local-secrets:/plugins/entries/tavily/config/webSearch/apiKey". Resolve this command against an active gateway runtime snapshot before reading it.`

1. 还报旧错误：
- `tavily`: 还报 `unresolved SecretRef`
- `google`: 还报 `API key not valid`

2. 我现在实际走的是：
- `web_search`: 内置工具
- `tavily`: skill / 插件链路
- `google`: 内置工具对应的搜索链路
